title: Rich Charred Filipino Pork Menudo
description: A hearty and comforting Filipino dish featuring charred pork, dark chocolate chips, and a rich creamy sauce, made with anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients. This menudo is perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the pork and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the pork from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the chocolate chips to the skillet and cook, stirring constantly, until melted and smooth.
Add the fish sauce, soy sauce, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the pork to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions if desired.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F and let it rest for 3 minutes before serving.
